digest.title: Bond-building treatments reduce hair damage by 67% in color services
digest.summary: Clinical study shows Olaplex and similar bond treatments significantly reduce breakage during chemical processes
digest.relevance: Salons offering color services, premium positioning

digest.title: Bridal bookings peak 6-8 months before wedding season
digest.summary: Data from 2,000+ salons shows optimal booking window for bridal trials is April-June for Oct-Dec weddings
digest.relevance: Wedding season planning, package promotion timing

seasonal_beats.pattern: Summer hair care demand peaks - anti-frizz and damage repair
